description: Model a parametric 2D wireframe profile of a Warren Truss in SolveSpace. The truss must consist of a bottom chord with 4 horizontal segments, a top chord with 3 horizontal segments, and 8 diagonals forming a continuous zig-zag pattern connecting the nodes. Constrain the left-most node of the bottom chord to the origin (0,0). Apply equal length constraints to all 15 line segments and set a distance constraint of 40.0 mm on the first bottom chord segment. Save the resulting file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/warren_truss.slvs.
